title: Broadcasting Intents Security-Sensitive in Android
description: In Android applications, broadcasting intents is security-sensitive. This rule raises an issue when an intent is broadcasted without specifying any "receiver permission". There is a risk if you answered yes to any of those questions. Restrict the access to broadcasted intents.
recommendation: Restrict the access to broadcasted intents.
impact: Exposes sensitive information to every application.

checks.message: Broadcasting an intent without specifying receiver permission is insecure.
